--- create_table_placement_key.sql
CREATE TABLE Singers (
  SingerId INT64 NOT NULL,
  SingerName STRING(MAX) NOT NULL,
  Location STRING(MAX) NOT NULL PLACEMENT KEY HIDDEN
) PRIMARY KEY (SingerId)

--- AST
&ast.CreateTable{
  Rparen:           138,
  PrimaryKeyRparen: 161,
  Name:             &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 13,
        NameEnd: 20,
        Name:    "Singers",
      },
    },
  },
  Columns: []*ast.ColumnDef{
    &ast.ColumnDef{
      Null: 44,
      Key:  -1,
      Name: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 25,
        NameEnd: 33,
        Name:    "SingerId",
      },
      Type: &ast.ScalarSchemaType{
        NamePos: 34,
        Name:    "INT64",
      },
      NotNull: true,
      Hidden:  -1,
    },
    &ast.ColumnDef{
      Null: 79,
      Key:  -1,
      Name: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 52,
        NameEnd: 62,
        Name:    "SingerName",
      },
      Type: &ast.SizedSchemaType{
        NamePos: 63,
        Rparen:  73,
        Name:    "STRING",
        Max:     true,
      },
      NotNull: true,
      Hidden:  -1,
    },
    &ast.ColumnDef{
      Null: 112,
      Key:  -1,
      Name: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 87,
        NameEnd: 95,
        Name:    "Location",
      },
      Type: &ast.SizedSchemaType{
        NamePos: 96,
        Rparen:  106,
        Name:    "STRING",
        Max:     true,
      },
      NotNull:      true,
      PlacementKey: &ast.PlacementKey{
        Placement: 117,
        Key:       127,
      },
      Hidden: 131,
    },
  },
  PrimaryKeys: []*ast.IndexKey{
    &ast.IndexKey{
      DirPos: -1,
      Name:   &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 153,
        NameEnd: 161,
        Name:    "SingerId",
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
CREATE TABLE Singers (
  SingerId INT64 NOT NULL,
  SingerName STRING(MAX) NOT NULL,
  Location STRING(MAX) NOT NULL PLACEMENT KEY HIDDEN
) PRIMARY KEY (SingerId)
